resultRaw.sql:
SELECT d.id AS department_id,
       d.name AS department_name,
       SUM(sch.amount) AS total_scholarship
FROM public.scholarships sch
JOIN public.students s ON sch.student_id = s.id
JOIN public.departments d ON s.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY total_scholarship DESC, d.name ASC;

issues: Visualization relies on the query returning pre-aggregated department totals (Vega-Lite has no aggregation specified) — this is fine given the SQL aggregation but would be wrong if raw row-level data were supplied.
Departments with no scholarships will be absent from the result (SQL uses inner joins); include a LEFT JOIN/zero-fill if you want departments with zero total shown.
Y-axis uses numeric format ".2f" (two decimals); consider currency formatting or integer formatting if cents are not relevant.

result.sql:
SELECT d.id AS department_id,
       d.name AS department_name,
       SUM(sch.amount) AS total_scholarship
FROM public.scholarships sch
JOIN public.students s ON sch.student_id = s.id
JOIN public.departments d ON s.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY total_scholarship DESC, d.name ASC;

issues: Visualization relies on the query returning pre-aggregated department totals (Vega-Lite has no aggregation specified) — this is fine given the SQL aggregation but would be wrong if raw row-level data were supplied.
Departments with no scholarships will be absent from the result (SQL uses inner joins); include a LEFT JOIN/zero-fill if you want departments with zero total shown.
Y-axis uses numeric format ".2f" (two decimals); consider currency formatting or integer formatting if cents are not relevant.
